page: Microsoft Azure D2s_v3 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DSv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL processor operating at 2.6 GHz. The configuration provides 2 vCPUs derived from 1 physical core with 2 threads per core. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core) and 16 GB of local storage, with support for Premium Storage. The CPU includes a 35 MB L3 cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 32 KB L1d cache, alongside hardware flags such as AVX, AVX-512F, AES, and FMA.

Benchmark results place this instance in the lower performance tiers. In stress-ng testing, single-core performance scored 1238.89 and multi-core performance reached 1629.2. Memory bandwidth is also limited, with uncached large-block read and write speeds at 13.15 GB/sec and 10.79 GB/sec respectively. Geekbench testing reflects similar constraints, yielding a single-core score of 1014.0 and a multi-core score of 1239.0. Database operations via Redis SET achieved 1.55 million operations per second, while static web serving throughput reached 1.68 GB/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D2s_v3 offers a low-cost entry point for workloads that do not require high computational density or memory throughput. The resource allocation is balanced for lightweight applications, but the low benchmark scores indicate significant performance tradeoffs for CPU-intensive tasks. This server is best suited for low-traffic web serving, small-scale testing and development environments, basic text processing, and lightweight background utility tasks.
description: The Microsoft Azure D2s_v3 is an entry-level general-purpose virtual machine from the DSv3 family, running on Microsoft Hyper-V. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL processor (x86_64 architecture) with 2 vCPUs, 1 physical core, and 2 threads per core running at 2.6 GHz. The hardware includes 8.0 GB of RAM, 16 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability, and a 35 MB L3 cache. Performance benchmarks place this instance in the lower tiers, with a Geekbench single-core score of 1014.0 and multi-core score of 1239.0. Memory bandwidth is constrained, with uncached read speeds at 13.15 GB/sec. Given its modest performance profile, the D2s_v3 is a cost-effective option for low-demand workloads such as lightweight web serving, development and testing environments, and basic background tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v3 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 16 GB of local storage, designed for lightweight workloads and development environments.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v3 is a general-purpose virtual machine with 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 16 GB of local storage for low-demand workloads.
tagline: A budget-friendly general-purpose virtual machine with dedicated Intel Xeon processing and balanced memory for entry-level workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 2 vCPUs and 2.6 GHz clock speed
8.0 GB of system memory and 16 GB of Premium Storage-capable local storage
Low-tier performance profile suitable for non-intensive compute tasks
Best suited for lightweight web serving, development, and testing environments
